title: Essential Oils Are Wrung:
content:
Essential oils are wrung:
    The attar from the rose
    Is not expressed by suns alone,
    It is the gift of screws.

    The general rose decays;
    But this, in lady's drawer,
    Makes summer when the lady lies
    In ceaseless rosemary.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "Essential Oils Are Wrung:", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
